title: PosUpperLevels Property
description:
PosUpperLevels Property

PosUpperLevels

Applies To

Force Motion Restriction Object FMR#

Comments

This sets or returns the upper threshold value of position of each axis, movement distance and rotation angle at the same time.
examples:
Function SettingLevels FSet FMR1.PosEnabled, True, True, True, True, True FSet FMR1.PosPolarities, FG_OUT, FG_OUT, FG_OUT, FG_OUT, FG_OUT FSet FMR1.PosUpperLevels, 100, 100, 100, 100, 100 Trap 1, FMR1 Call ForceError
Fend
